result:
Draft saved to `runtime/drafts/brightpath-decline.md`. Here it is:

---

**To:** Jordan Vela \<jordan@brightpath.example\>
**Subject:** Re: Fixed-bid redesign, budget 18,000

Hi Jordan,

Thanks for reaching out. Onboarding redesign is squarely in our wheelhouse, and the late-summer timeline is workable.

That said, our fixed-bid floor is $25,000. At $18,000 we would not be able to staff the engagement in a way that serves you well, so I don't want to take it on and leave you short.

If the budget has any flexibility, I'm happy to talk through what a scoped project at our minimum would include. Alternatively, if a time-and-materials arrangement would work on your end, we could look at a lighter engagement that fits within your range.

Either way, wish you luck with the project.

Best, Dana

---

$18k is below the studio's $25k fixed-bid floor, so this declines cleanly while leaving a door open on budget or T&M. Send it whenever ready.
